title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BANTUG COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN BARRIO BANTUG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF UMINGAN. PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO DOÃA S. BELISARIO-ADAMOS COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 5210 / 65 OG No. 12, 2842 (March 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5119, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BANTUG COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN BARRIO BANTUG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF UMINGAN. PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO DOÃA S. BELISARIO-ADAMOS COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Bantug Community School in Barrio Bantug in the Municipality of Umingan, Province of Pangasinan, is hereby changed to Doña S. Belisario-Adamos Community School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
